title: Actions & Swords
description: This Resource Pack remades all swords in the game in a actions and stuff style
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af1e33cfe54d2454a39cb1cf9a8d7373eabd0cd1.png)

This pack reworks all the **minecrafty swords** into **small good looking ones** like this:

![Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f16f69da70f81bb726bd7c37b8ba0a3e49a1ecd.png)

made for **pvp packs** but this can be used in **survival minecraft** also, this pack was **inspired** by the **bedrock pack** called: **"Actions & Stuff"**
